changes: Added typing_timeouts DashMap<String, Instant> to ConnectionPool
Added record_typing() method - records typing state and lazily cleans stale entries
Added remove_typing() method - clears typing state on TypingStop
Added cleanup_stale_typing() method - removes entries older than 5 seconds
TypingStart handler: records typing state + broadcasts Typing event to channel
TypingStop handler: removes typing state (replaces previous no-op)
Sender exclusion: broadcast receive loop skips Typing events from self
Heartbeat periodic cleanup: calls cleanup_stale_typing() every heartbeat cycle
